affiliation: UT Austin McCombs School of Business
research_themes: causal inference with observational and experimental data
cooperation and game theory on networks
LLM measurement and econometrics of text data

active_projects.Cooperation_PNAS: Temporary prosocial intervention creates long-lived cooperation on networks. Game theory, evolutionary dynamics.
active_projects.Adaptive_Monoculture: Fixed-objective AI steering depletes adaptive reserve. Welfare reversal, cultural homogenization.
active_projects.Curation_Divergence: Competing AI intermediaries fragment shared beliefs through phase transition in curation divergence.
active_projects.Structural_Targeting: Allocation-level structural targeting equalizes bridging capital in AI-mediated networks.
active_projects.AI_Governance_PNAS: How AI changes the optimal scale of governance for public goods. Rate-distortion theory.
active_projects.Provenance_Preference: Mechanistic interpretability: provenance of economic preference-like behavior in LLMs. Causal tracing across training stages.
active_projects.Constrained_Causal_Abstraction: Network science + mechanistic interpretability. Causal discovery under structural constraints.
active_projects.Inf_Steering: Influence-aligned steering: minimum-norm activation edits matching logit changes. ICML target.
active_projects.Net_DPO: Personalization-consistency tradeoff in connected knowledge-work assistants. Management Science target.
active_projects.LLMMeasurements: Causal inference with AI-measured text outcomes. Audited LLM measurement, doubly-robust AIPW.
active_projects.LLM_Prompt_Variations: Econometric study of prompt sensitivity in LLMs. Treatment effects on model behavior.
active_projects.Visible_Context_Thresholds: Phase transitions in emergent behavior of tool-using LLM agents. Nature Machine Intelligence.
active_projects.Visual_Evidence_Response: Visual evidence response curves for multimodal LLM grounding. Nature Machine Intelligence.
active_projects.Preference_Geometry: Economic preference theory, risk/social preferences in LLMs.
active_projects.GPT_Pricing_Bias: LLM pricing bias in market settings.
